stabilization_window.promotion_rule: Switch all measure-only metrics to blocking after non_blocking_until if sanity checks pass for 14 consecutive days.

metrics.definition: Share of required Quality Guardrails checks that pass on main over a rolling 14-day window.
metrics.source_of_truth: .github/workflows/quality-guardrails.yml job outcomes + branch protection required-check logs

metrics.definition: Number of test cases classified as flaky in CI reruns over the rolling 7-day window.
metrics.source_of_truth: CI rerun diagnostics and failure classification artifacts

metrics.definition: Maximum allowed age in days for governance/process docs without a freshness review stamp.
metrics.source_of_truth: docs/process review timestamps and freshness checklist updates

metrics.definition: Count of dependencies drifting beyond allowed parity between lockfiles/toolchain declarations and CI pins.
metrics.source_of_truth: scripts/ci/check_toolchain_parity.py output and lockfile drift reports

metrics.definition: Net movement toward higher contract maturity states per release cycle (no regressions in accepted contracts).
metrics.source_of_truth: Contract maturity ledger and release readiness checklist deltas
